# `huggingface_hub` v1.24.0 metadata fixtures

These records are generated by `generate.py` against `huggingface_hub` v1.24.0
at commit `36fd32c84d630f455a23b9a3bc4dc7b76d19cdde`.

They cover only the upstream ref, tree-cache, and `local_dir` download-metadata
formats. Their presence does not establish full Hub-cache compatibility.
Text records are normalized to LF after the pinned writers run so that the
checked-in bytes are deterministic across Python hosts.

To regenerate them, check out the pinned commit in the reference repository and
run:

```text
PYTHONPATH=<reference>/src python generate.py
```
